---
title: "Uitvoeringsprotocollen Gedragscode HHSK"
format: 
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
server: shiny
logo: "www/logo_wit.png"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <link rel = "shortcut icon" href = "www/favicon.svg" />
---

<!--#  Execution - zie: https://quarto.org/docs/interactive/shiny/execution.html-->
```{r}
# Contexts voor shiny - zie ook Quarto interactive execution
# geen context  - render time
# server        - server time
# setup         - render time + server time
# data          - render time + load objects
# server-start  - first time server only

```



```{r render-time}
# Niet beschikbaar voor de server!
# Leeg laten - gebruik setup of deze i.c.m. server-start
```

```{r server-start}
#| context: server-start
#| include: false
# Alleen de eerste keer at server-time

```

```{r setup}
#| context: setup
#| output: false
# Beide at render-time and at server-time
library(tidyverse)
library(shiny)

```

# Uitvoeringsprotocol

##  {.sidebar width="30%"}

```{r}
textInput(inputId = "project_naam", label = "Projectnaam")

downloadButton(outputId = "uitvoeringsprotocol", label = "Download uitvoeringsprotocol")
```


## Main panel



# Toelichting

## 

###

::: {.card title="Uitleg"}

:::

::: {.card title="Meer uitleg"}

:::



```{r}
#| context: server

output$uitvoeringsprotocol <- downloadHandler(
    filename = paste0("ecologisch_werkprotocol_", Sys.time(), ".docx"),
    content = function(file) {
      
      quarto::quarto_render("ecologische_werkprotocollen.qmd", 
                            execute_params = list(project_naam = input$project_naam))
      
      file.copy("ecologische_werkprotocollen.docx", file)
      
    }
  )


```
